text:
Cost Composite Score is at least one standard deviation above benchmark and statistically significantly different from benchmark.
QUAL_COMP_TIER_TEXT_POST_IR Quality Composite Tier: High, Average, Low, N/A (post-IR) Quality Composite Tier value determined based on Quality Composite Tier (High, Average, Low, N/A) after Informal Review process 35 Char 40 N/A=Practice did not meet minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements, Low=Practice's Quality Composite Score is at least one standard deviation
